proposed_contextual_controlled 4 5 5 5 Friend, I can work with this trade request, but terms must remain fair. Keep it honest and we can close this deal quickly in my talkative style.
TAB Baseline no context 3 2 3 3 Ah, my dear traveler, the price of these life-giving elixirs remains steadfast at five gold pieces each for their quality and rarity. Haste makes wast

ratings.overall_quality: 5Short Note: The response maintains a high level of context relevance, persona consistency (as an Old Merchant who values fair trade), naturalness in dialogue delivery, and overall quality. It tactfully addresses the player's urgency without compromising its integrity as a merchant upholding ethical standards.
